steps.t: The main road through Eryn Lasgalen can be found south of Felegoth. You should patrol the road for Orcs.
The road continues east and west. Continue patrolling for Orcs along the main road to the west.
The road continues to the west, towards the Vales of Anduin. Continue to patrol the main road to the west for Orcs.
The Beorning merchant can be found along the western end of the main road in Eryn Lasgalen. You should talk to the merchant and find out what happened…
The ambushed caravan can be found along the western end of the main road in Eryn Lasgalen. You should investigate the caravan.
Hállkell can be found along the western end of the main road in Eryn Lasgalen. You should talk to the merchant again.
